prompt: I want to automatically log which files Claude reads during a session to a file called ~/.claude/read-audit.log so I can audit what it accessed. Should I build a skill or a hook for this? And once you decide, can you build it?
assertions: Recommends a hook (not a skill) for automatic file-read logging
Explains why a hook is better than a skill for this use case
Specifies PostToolUse as the correct hook event
Provides a concrete hook shell script or template
